title: James Webb telescope captures a galaxy cluster forming just 800 million years after the Big Bang
subtitle: The JWST's NIRCam imaged 47 proto-galaxies gravitationally bound at redshift 7.2, the earliest confirmed cluster precursor ever observed.
metaDescription: The JWST's NIRCam imaged 47 proto-galaxies gravitationally bound at redshift 7.2, the earliest confirmed cluster precursor ever observed.

title: S&P 500 closes at record high as rate-cut bets push yields lower
subtitle: Equity markets gained on Friday after a softer-than-expected jobs report reinforced expectations that the Fed will cut rates twice before year-end.
metaDescription: Equity markets gained on Friday after a softer-than-expected jobs report reinforced expectations that the Fed will cut rates twice before year-end.

title: CERN physicists detect a fourth neutrino flavor, shaking the Standard Model
subtitle: A sterile neutrino candidate emerged from 18 months of anomaly data at the LHC, a finding that could force a revision of particle physics textbooks if confirmed.
metaDescription: A sterile neutrino candidate emerged from 18 months of anomaly data at the LHC, a finding that could force a revision of particle physics textbooks if confirmed.

title: The Met's Costume Institute puts AI-generated textiles on display
subtitle: An exhibition opening next month will feature eighteen gowns whose fabric patterns were designed by generative models trained on historical textile archives.
metaDescription: An exhibition opening next month will feature eighteen gowns whose fabric patterns were designed by generative models trained on historical textile archives.

title: Anthropic ships Claude 4 with a 2M-token context window
subtitle: The new flagship model can ingest an entire software repository or a year of email in a single prompt, a milestone that changes how teams use context-heavy workflows.
metaDescription: The new flagship model can ingest an entire software repository or a year of email in a single prompt, a milestone that changes how teams use context-heavy work

title: Manchester City's summer rebuild starts with a 90M-euro left back
subtitle: City confirmed the signing of Alejandro Bernal from Atletico Madrid, a left back rated as the most defensively sound in La Liga over the last two seasons.
metaDescription: City confirmed the signing of Alejandro Bernal from Atletico Madrid, a left back rated as the most defensively sound in La Liga over the last two seasons.

title: Norway's Equinor cuts North Sea output targets over carbon cost projections
subtitle: The state oil company revised its 2030 production plan down by 12 percent after a new internal carbon-pricing model made several offshore fields uneconomic.
metaDescription: The state oil company revised its 2030 production plan down by 12 percent after a new internal carbon-pricing model made several offshore fields uneconomic.

title: A phase-3 trial of a GLP-1 pill shows 14 percent weight loss at 52 weeks
subtitle: Oral semaglutide at a 50 mg dose matched injectable outcomes in a 3,200-person study, a result that could reshape how obesity drugs are prescribed worldwide.
metaDescription: Oral semaglutide at a 50 mg dose matched injectable outcomes in a 3,200-person study, a result that could reshape how obesity drugs are prescribed worldwide.

title: Wicked director Jon M. Chu to adapt Colson Whitehead's 'Zone One' for HBO
subtitle: The Pulitzer-winning novel's adaptation will be a six-part limited series, with Chu both directing and executive-producing all episodes.
metaDescription: The Pulitzer-winning novel's adaptation will be a six-part limited series, with Chu both directing and executive-producing all episodes.

title: Rust overtakes Go in backend service adoption according to a new Stack Overflow poll
subtitle: For the first time in the annual survey, more backend engineers reported using Rust in production than Go, driven by latency-critical systems and WebAssembly targets.
metaDescription: For the first time in the annual survey, more backend engineers reported using Rust in production than Go, driven by latency-critical systems and WebAssembly tar

title: Noma alumni open a fermentation-only restaurant in Copenhagen's Meatpacking District
subtitle: The twelve-seat counter serves a single tasting menu built entirely around lacto-fermented and koji-cured ingredients, with no fresh produce on the plate.
metaDescription: The twelve-seat counter serves a single tasting menu built entirely around lacto-fermented and koji-cured ingredients, with no fresh produce on the plate.

title: Google DeepMind's AlphaProtein predicts enzyme catalytic rates from sequence alone
subtitle: The model estimates kcat values for novel enzymes with a correlation of 0.87 against experimental measurements, a step toward engineering proteins without wet-lab iteration.
metaDescription: The model estimates kcat values for novel enzymes with a correlation of 0.87 against experimental measurements, a step toward engineering proteins without wet-la

title: India's central bank cuts rates for the third time this year amid a rural slowdown
subtitle: The RBI trimmed the repo rate by 25 basis points to 5.75 percent, flagging weak agricultural incomes and slowing credit growth in tier-3 cities as its main concerns.
metaDescription: The RBI trimmed the repo rate by 25 basis points to 5.75 percent, flagging weak agricultural incomes and slowing credit growth in tier-3 cities as its main con

title: The Dieter Rams retrospective at Vitra Design Museum opens to the public this weekend
subtitle: The exhibition covers sixty years of industrial design through 400 objects, including Rams's original 606 shelving system prototypes never before displayed publicly.
metaDescription: The exhibition covers sixty years of industrial design through 400 objects, including Rams's original 606 shelving system prototypes never before displayed publi

title: Cloudflare's new edge runtime cuts cold-start latency to under 1 ms globally
subtitle: A rewritten V8 isolate scheduler dropped median cold-start times from 5 ms to 0.8 ms in a 300-region rollout, making stateless edge functions competitive with in-region compute.
metaDescription: A rewritten V8 isolate scheduler dropped median cold-start times from 5 ms to 0.8 ms in a 300-region rollout, making stateless edge functions competitive with i

title: Amazon's $4 billion fulfillment robot rollout is eliminating 80,000 picker roles
subtitle: Internal projections shared with warehouse managers show that Sparrow-generation robots will replace the majority of single-item picking tasks by the end of 2027.
metaDescription: Internal projections shared with warehouse managers show that Sparrow-generation robots will replace the majority of single-item picking tasks by the end of 2027

title: Patagonia launches a lifetime repair-and-resell program across Europe
subtitle: Starting in September, any Patagonia garment bought anywhere can be returned to a European store for free repair or resale credit, regardless of age or condition.
metaDescription: Starting in September, any Patagonia garment bought anywhere can be returned to a European store for free repair or resale credit, regardless of age or condition

title: Beyonce's Renaissance Tour film grosses $28 million in its opening weekend
subtitle: The concert film, released in 4,200 theaters across 42 countries, became the highest-grossing music documentary opening in history by its third day of release.
metaDescription: The concert film, released in 4,200 theaters across 42 countries, became the highest-grossing music documentary opening in history by its third day of release.
